name: Spotter
ability: You start knowing who has the Lethargic's crab. [+the Lethargic]
firstNightReminder: Point to the player with the Has Crab reminder.

name: Thespian
ability: Each night, choose if evil abilities choose you instead until dusk.
firstNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.
otherNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.

name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain the ability of an alive neighbor (you don't know which) until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.1)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, mark an alive neighbor with the *MIMICKED* reminder. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, mark an alive neighbor with the *MIMICKED* reminder. :reminder:

name: Skulker
ability: Each night, choose a player: until dusk, if you die, swap characters with them & they die instead. The Storyteller may prompt you to choose differently.
firstNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:

name: Loose
ability: Each night*, choose to register as dead until dusk.
flavor: icon is a cut, loose, string (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Loose either nods or shakes their head. :reminder:

name: Speaker
ability: Each night*, choose a dead player: learn how they died.
flavor: make the icon something that brings to mind the book speaker for the dead (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Speaker points to a dead player. Show the player's death reminder.

name: Naturalist
ability: Each night*, if no-one died today, learn a player's character & how many steps they are from you.
otherNightReminder: If no one died today, show a player's character token & give a finger signal.

name: Poet
ability: Once per game, during the day, publicly claim to be the Poet: the Demon is drunk until dawn.
flavor: a poet and you don't even know it! (v1.1)

name: Imaginary Friend
ability: You don't register as a player, even if dead.
flavor: Do you see it, above you? Reach for it; push your hand into the deep. Feel for it; it is wet and it cuts you and like silver it slivers. Grasp it, no matter how much it shimmers. Cut it like it cut you. (v1.1)

name: Lovebug
ability: You & a Minion are mad as the Minion's character, or you or them might be executed.
firstNightReminder: Show the Minion character token marked *MAD*.

name: Secretary
ability: If you died today or tonight, guess your alive neighbors' alignments: if correct, you live.
otherNightReminder: The Secretary points to 2 players & gives 2 thumbs up or down.

name: Pitied
ability: If you are the last living good player, good wins.

name: Lethargic
ability: 1 good player has your crab. If you guess (once) who it is, you can no longer die. If just 3 players live, you lose this ability.
firstNightReminder: Wake the player with the Has Crab reminder. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token then the Lethargic token.

name: Desperate
ability: You are evil if at least one reminder token is on you. If not, you are good.

name: Bookkeeper
ability: You can't speak the group's primary language, or might be executed.

name: Identical Twin
ability: You register as an in-play Townsfolk character, even if dead. All players know you or them are this character.

name: Bad Apple
ability: [1 to ? Outsiders are evil]

name: Hypnotist
ability: Each night*, choose a player & a character they think they become.
flavor: Five, three, four, two, zero, one. Three, five, two, four, one, zero. It is 11:59 PM. Now, it is 12:00 AM. (v1.0)
otherNightReminder: The Hypnotist chooses a player & a character. Put the Hypnotist to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & the chosen character token.

name: Cyclast
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose X players: they die. If your team wins in the next X-1 days, your team loses, even if you are dead.
flavor: icon should be a shattered prism (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Cyclast might choose X players. :reminder: X-1:reminder:s

name: Worm
ability: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & choose 2 players: whatever happens to one also happenes to the other.
flavor: Ever since then, I've been able to see things I couldn't before; feel things I could've never imagined. It doesn't feel... good, nor is it painful either; it's something different. I'm not sure why, but I haven't been able to stop crying. (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Worm needs.

name: Bait
ability: When nominated, if the nominator is good, they are poisoned.
flavor: Beware of the riverside! I hear of a great fish that lurks among the bank; they say it comes from the back of the moon. Its scales shiver with fever and its air is moonlight. (v1.1)

name: Seed
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If all Townsfolk are dead, evil wins. [+2 Outsiders]

name: Them
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [Half of players are evil. Evil are in a line. No Minions]
flavor: They are the calm. They are the storm. They are the wire that binds us all. Their sweat gives us life. We breathe so They can bleed. Your skin peels and under that skin you'll find Them. (v1.0)

name: Waste
ability: Each night*, choose a player & a good character they become. The previously chosen character dies.
flavor: It was soon after the skyscrapers melted that the Waste arose. It was soon after the sky fell that the Waste awoke. It was soon after the pets became monsters and the people became horrors that the Waste shined its brightest. (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Waste chooses a player & a character. Put the Waste to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & their new character token. :reminder: The previously chosen character dies. :reminder:

name: Shef
ability: If you were executed today & more than 3 players live, you are woken to choose a player: they become an evil Shef. [No Minions]
flavor: DOWNLOAD NOW!!! AWESOME BLOOD ON THE CLOCKTOWER (FREE!) FREE --- CLICK HERE --- FREE DOWNLOAD NO VIRUS PLAY NOW!!! (v1.0)

name: Adulterer
ability: If a 50% majority accuses a player of adultery, they can't nominate nor vote.
